def negative_exception_used_for_expected_lookup_miss_in_loop():
    rule_id = "exception_used_for_expected_lookup_miss_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that rely on exceptions for common cache or dict misses."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
